name: secret
description: /secret <args> — wraps the `secret` CLI (macOS Keychain-backed credentials, dancinlab/secret 0.4.0, dual-channel sync). Verbs: get · set · rotate · check · delete · list · service · init [icloud|github <url>] · backup [enable <url>|disable|status|<empty>] · sync · migrate. High-value protection on set (BIP39 wordlist-validated · xprv/WIF/64-hex auto-detect → refuse without --allow-mnemonic + stdin/tty). rotate emits sentinel only (value never printed). Auto-push ON by default once `backup enable` runs (opt out via SECRET_BACKUP_AUTO=0). ⚠ /secret get exposes value in conversation context; prefer inline bash $(secret get <k>) for tool-invocation patterns.
